# James Mason's Design Sandbox

> A Next.js sandbox for design experiments, blog posts, and documentation on building with AI agents.

This is a personal design lab where James Mason explores visual design, typography, layout systems, and agentic AI workflows. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and CSS Modules. Each experiment is self-contained. The blog covers the experience of designing and building software collaboratively with AI agents.

Source: https://github.com/optimusjames/masons-world

## Design Experiments

- [Yoga Cards](https://masons-world.vercel.app/design-experiments/yoga-cards): Flippable yoga pose cards in five layouts with shareable deep links, CSS 3D transforms, and staggered animations
- [Yoga Guide](https://masons-world.vercel.app/design-experiments/yoga-guide): Five-step questionnaire that produces a personalized yoga prescription with poses, breathing, and Ayurvedic guidance
- [Yoga Flow](https://masons-world.vercel.app/design-experiments/yoga-flow): Two-screen yoga flow planner with duration/level selection and sequenced pose list
- [Yoga Breathing](https://masons-world.vercel.app/design-experiments/yoga-breathing): Animated breathing timer with five techniques, three color themes, and duration options
- [CrossFit Bento](https://masons-world.vercel.app/design-experiments/crossfit-bento): Dark bento grid dashboard for CrossFit training data with charts and heatmaps
- [Sticky Notes](https://masons-world.vercel.app/design-experiments/sticky-notes): Interactive sticky note stack with swipe animation and handwriting font

## Blog

- [Who's the Smartest?](https://masons-world.vercel.app/blog/whos-the-smartest): On vibe as intelligence, and why it's about to matter more
- [Wrong Again](https://masons-world.vercel.app/blog/wrong-again): On being wrong, adjusting, and the loop that actually works
- [This Is Gonna Be Fun](https://masons-world.vercel.app/blog/this-is-gonna-be-fun): On starting before you know what you're doing
- [You Can't Force It](https://masons-world.vercel.app/blog/you-cant-force-it): On leading by listening, and why it works the same way with AI

## Docs

- [Development Progress](https://masons-world.vercel.app/docs/progress): Major changes and milestones as the project evolves
- [The Sandbox](https://masons-world.vercel.app/docs/guide/sandbox): How the design sandbox works
- [Blog](https://masons-world.vercel.app/docs/guide/blog): How the blog is structured
- [Design Experiments](https://masons-world.vercel.app/docs/guide/experiments): How design experiments are built and shipped
- [Skills](https://masons-world.vercel.app/docs/guide/skills): Claude Code skill system used in this project

- [Recommended Links](https://masons-world.vercel.app/recommended): Curated links to YouTube videos, GitHub repos, and web tools with auto-fetched thumbnails
